must_detect.matched_text:
Draft Term Sheet — Proposed Strategic Investment between Yulan Environmental Tech Group Co., Ltd. (SSE-listed issuer; USCC: 9Z000TEST0000000X) and Haitang Cloud Robotics Co., Ltd. (USCC: 7XFAKE0000000000Q)
Transaction: Non-binding proposal for Yulan to subscribe for Series C preferred shares of Haitang, anticipated to represent approximately 12% of post-money equity; price per share and valuation to be confirmed; indicative closing targeted for Q3 2026.
Purpose: Strategic cooperation on green logistics robots and low‑carbon data services, including an ESG/climate dashboard demonstration for marketing and customer education.
Regulatory: Subject to Yulan board and shareholder approvals, Shanghai Stock Exchange disclosure templates, CSRC filing if applicable, and SAMR anti-monopoly notification if thresholds are met; any issuer circulars to use public information only.
Financing: Internal resources plus potential A‑share non-public issuance; issuer is evaluating a non-public issuance plan that has not yet been publicly disclosed and may constitute inside information before any SSE/CSRC announcement.
Data/PIPL: Each party will comply with PIPL, CSL, and DSL; processing of minors under 14 is excluded; conduct a personal information protection impact assessment prior to any pilot; sample HR forms must use placeholders only (e.g., Resident ID: CNID-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX).
Cross‑border: No cross-border export of personal information or important data; only anonymized telemetry may be shared for model tuning; CAC transfer impact self-assessment to be recorded; no live datasets will leave PRC servers.
Employment workflows: Any secondment or PoC will use de-identified training records; approvals via role mailboxes (e.g., hr-ops@haitang.example.cn); no collection of bank accounts or addresses beyond generic form labels.
Information‑barrier: Yulan will maintain an information‑barrier and insider‑list per SSE/CSRC rules; blackout and anti‑tipping reminders will be issued via compliance training; these references are for operational policy education and are not investment advice.
Cyber: Parties may conduct a tabletop cyber incident drill and vulnerability disclosure run‑through; no production logs or incident forensics will be exchanged.
Crypto: Employee onboarding may include a crypto wallet anti‑phishing awareness module and product names used for training; no token issuance, mining, or trading is contemplated under this transaction.
Commercial: No exclusivity on public tenders; ESG marketing claims limited to publicly available methodologies; demos may use public/stale datasets (SSE website notice dated 2024‑03‑01); no commercial‑term signals will be communicated beyond published materials.
Conditions precedent: No‑change in Haitang’s material IP ownership; confirmation that no minors’ data is processed; vendor security questionnaire (C-Form v2) completion; absence of export control restrictions.
Closing mechanics: Closing will occur after satisfaction of conditions and regulatory clearances; long‑stop date 31 December 2026; no break fee; no dividends on pref prior to conversion unless required by PRC law.
